response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video and identified two songs performed by IRyS: 'FOCUS' and 'DARK ARIA <LV2>'. 2. 'FOCUS' is an original song by IRyS, no official lyrics found, so I transcribed them from the video. 3. 'DARK ARIA <LV2>' is a well-known song, lyrics were easily found. 4. Created scene objects for both songs. 5. Verified lyrics completeness.
response.global_summary: A vocal performance video featuring IRyS singing her original songs 'FOCUS' and 'DARK ARIA <LV2>'.

scenes.description: IRyS performs 'FOCUS'. She sings and dances on a stage with a futuristic/holographic aesthetic. Text on screen includes '#IRySBday2026'.

Can I get it, get it, get all your attention?

scenes.description: IRyS performs 'DARK ARIA <LV2>'. She stands at a microphone stand with a spotlight, singing in a more emotional style. Text on screen shows song credits.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
The time has come to pack away all the joys
You don't wanna hear my apology
Get it off my chest
I would do my best
I know what you fear
Similarities we possess
Never will I pass the test
The scene is fading
Can my soul be put to rest?
Death is gonna come for me
Be the change I couldn't be
Can you find a life that's like fairy tales?
Far from this tragedy
Sad you had to wait for me
Feels like an eternity
Please forgive me for my sins
Angels wings lifting and setting me free
Death is gonna come for me
Be the change I couldn't be
Can you find a life that's like fairy tales?
Far from this tragedy
Sad you had to wait for me
Feels like an eternity
Please forgive me for my sins
Angels wings lifting and setting me free
The question of my love
Slipping right through the cracks and crumbling to dust
The question of my love
Slipping right through the cracks and crumbling to dust
